steps.title: Recognize what evidence would support the claim
steps.content: The claim asserts that medicine and health submissions peaked in 2019. Supporting evidence must demonstrate that medicine and health in 2019 exceeded the values for this topic in every other year shown.

steps.title: Find the choice that provides this evidence
steps.content: Choice D identifies medicine and health submissions at approximately 285 in 2019 as the peak value. Choices A and C discuss unrelated topics, while B reports false data. That matches choice D — D is correct.
